member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.GainManager.GetHashCode
member.summary: Hash code here is a mean way to save intermediate state for different action updates which can be called several times per one MouseUp (e.g. AdjustTimeActionHandler-s)

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.GainManager.IsSingleOptimizedNode(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode})
member.summary: Determine whether this function instance was optimized as "single instance".

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.GainManager.IsCompletelyOptimizedNode(JetBrains.Common.Util.Metadata.FunctionId)
member.summary: Determine whether this function instance was optimized as "all instances".

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.GainManager.RemoveGain(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode})
member.summary: If we have gain by ALL instances of the function with the given FId, remove all of them, otherwise remove gain defined by the particular node.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.GainManager.RemoveGainById(JetBrains.Common.Util.Metadata.FunctionId)
member.summary: Given the sample node, remove gains defined by ANY instance of the function with the given FId

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.GainManager.RemoveGainByGivenId(JetBrains.Common.Util.Metadata.FunctionId)
member.summary: Consistent removal of gain information from all reference sources at once. This guarantees that we will not forget to remove info from any linked source.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.HotspotsProcessing.FunctionsStatisticsInTypes.MethodInfo
member.summary: Keeps snapshot's info about the method call (FunctionID, time) and hierarchy of types ascending to the first declaration of the method

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.HotspotsProcessing.FunctionsStatisticsInTypes.MethodInTypeData
member.summary: Keeps data about single method of class/interface summarized by all calls of this method in derived classes.

member.name: P:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.HotspotsProcessing.FunctionsStatisticsInTypes.MethodInTypeData.Implementations
member.summary: All calls of the method in derived classes with own time, system time and total time for them

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.HotspotsProcessing.FunctionsStatisticsInTypes.TypeInfo
member.summary: Keeps data about some class/interface which methods or their implementations were found in snapshot

member.name: P:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.HotspotsProcessing.FunctionsStatisticsInTypes.TypeInfo.Methods
member.summary: All methods of the class/interface with summarized statistic for them by all derived classes

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.HotspotsProcessing.FunctionsStatisticsInTypes.TypeInfo.UpdateMethodData(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.HotspotsProcessing.FunctionsStatisticsInTypes.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Adds or update data about the method of this class/interface

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.HotspotsProcessing.FunctionsStatisticsInTypes.myTypes
member.summary: All types which can be extracted from functions calls begining from the leaf class (last in the types hierarchy) up to the root class or interface where the function is firstly declared.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Components.HotspotsProcessing.FunctionsStatisticsInTypes.GetResults
member.summary: Returns hotspots statistics by solution's classes hierarchy.
Return false if there is no user function between and

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.ExposeSnapshotContainerForSnapshotToolWindowContent
member.summary: A service component to facilitate operations.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.IFunctionEnumeratorFilter`1
member.summary: IFunctionEnumeratorFilter is used to filter out function headers during the snapshot headers or functions' ids enumeration.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.INodeConstructor
member.summary:
This is a basic interface for all classes which perform the construction of all types of tree/list(s) nodes. General strategy is to construct new type of node on the base of existing one.
Example: construct tree node representing all instances of some function.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.IStructureFilter`1
member.summary: Structure filters are responsible e.g. for selecting children in the list of node's children.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.IContextDependableFilter`1
member.summary: Context-dependable structure filters require that each its user takes responsibility for initiating them with relevant compare values before each usage.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.TruePredicate
member.summary: Restricted-usage predicate

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.BacktraceThreadNode
member.summary: Special type of ThreadStartNode which correctly computes its time (as it is done in the parent class) but also prohibits its expansion since in the backtraces or hotspots view it serves as a leaf node.
Construct TOP-level backtrace node from the example node (of different view, for example)
Create a top-node's child->parents map using the storage nodes of the child.

Construct TOP-level backtrace node from the header node (of a different view, for example). This separate ctor allows us not to retrieve all snapshot nodes but rather use the header node references which are already stored in the header nodes.
Create a top-node's child->parents map using a sequence of the nodeRefs from the header child node.
Construct non-top-level backtrace node from the information which is already structured in the top-level nodes.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.BacktraceTreeNode.CreateParent2TimeMap(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode,JetBrains.Util.Pair{JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode,System.UInt64}})
member.summary: Create a nontop-node's child->parent map using an existing map of a node's child.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ByOffsetComparer
member.summary: Comparer used for storing CallTreeSectionNode(s) in HashSets.

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.PerformanceTreeNodeBase.RecursionAnalysisMode.DoNotAnalyze
member.summary: Clear flag "IsRecursive" from the node and skips the recursion processing.

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.PerformanceTreeNodeBase.RecursionAnalysisMode.LeaveAsIs
member.summary: Flag "IsRecursive" is set up only on the basis of the given storage nodes to the node ctor. Complete recursion processing is skipped.

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.PerformanceTreeNodeBase.RecursionAnalysisMode.SelfAnalysis
member.summary: To determine the "IsRecursive" flag value, the complete recursion processing is performed.

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.PerformanceTreeNodeBase.RecursionAnalysisMode.AnalyzeInputSet
member.summary: Given that a complete set of the storage nodes (within the particular stacktrace, that is "tab") is given, "IsRecursive" flag is determined on the basis of whether the computed top-nodes coinside with the given set.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.PerformanceTreeNodeBase.SelfInitializeGain
member.summary: It is REQUIRED to call this method right after the parent ctor finishes its construction

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.PerformanceTreeNodeBase.GetChildren
member.summary: Children must be grouped by the id.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.PerformanceTreeNodeBase.GetParents
member.summary: Parents must be grouped by the id.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.DiffTreeNode.GetChildren
member.summary: Children must be grouped by the id.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.CommonRootNode
member.summary: CommonRootNode is an agglomeration of the thread root storage nodes for the "AllThreads" mode of a call tree view (as opposite, RootNode is a root for the "PerThread" mode.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.MultirootNode
member.summary: Keep first-level children explicitely, compute the total time and calls count only for top-nodes, excluding internal calls. Formal signature coinsides with that of the first child node, but the symbolic representation is taken only for the whole class.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.MultirootNode.CreateNode(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode}},JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot)
member.summary: Explicitely compute time and calls for different combinations of input children. Goal is to avoid "TreeNode.GetStorageNodes()" as much as possible. NB: We can not compute overall top nodes relationship for all public methods (that is if they call each other, we tend to add some extra time to the summary class time).

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.MultirootNode.NodeInfo
member.summary: Since Multiroot node uses a pre-computed set of children, all of them need to be updated manually when new Delta value is submitted, e.g. as the result of Gain computation. This instance of the NodeInfo does that.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.HeaderNode.ForContentDo(System.Action{JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode})
member.summary: Iterate over the references in all Headers, create nodes from refs, but instead of collecting them in an array, directly apply an action to remove possible OOM exception.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.HeaderNode.ForHeaderRefNodeDirectDo(System.Action{JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTreeHeader.HeaderNodeRef,JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTreeHeader.IHeaderDataNode},JetBrains.Common.Util.IExecutionControllerOld)
member.summary: Ensure that all HeaderNodeRefs are oredered ascendigly based on their CallTreeSectionOffset: - headers are read in direct order, node refs are returned in the reverse order.

member.name: P:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.DiffNodeCtor.NormalizingRatio
member.summary: Describes a factor which changes total time of a function when # of calls differs in two nodes forming a diffnode. The factor is applied to all diff nodes created with this ctor.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IHierarchyNode`1
member.summary: IHierarchyNode represents relationship between (possibly aggregated, grouped or else preprocessed) snapshot nodes corresponding to function instances calls of each other.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IHierarchyNode`1.CanExpand(System.Predicate{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{`0}})
member.summary: Difference between this method and the previous one is in the predicate which causes to return "true" on the first element which satisfies the predicate.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode
member.summary: IMeasureNode aggregates all numeric information collected with each structure node

member.name: P:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode.Time
member.summary: Field represents "total time" spent in the function and ALL subfunctions below it, that is it is the time of the whole subtree. Time keeps everything in "natural" computer units (e.g. in ticks).

member.name: P:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode.Delta
member.summary: A value which affects node's position in the tree (via NodeBy*Comparer) and the actual value shown in the *Presenters classes.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode.SetModifiedTime(System.Int64)
member.summary: Sometimes a (derived) tree node can compute its total time only after some transformations or analysis of its children, that is after the initial time was already initialized by the base class. For this purspose change of the inherent properties of the node is done explicitely.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode.ClearRecursionByOracle
member.summary: Our major recursion analysis problem (with complex recursion topology, intersecting its branches) requires that its sign (IsRecursive) is analyzed externally from the node (since the node itself does not know its context, that is how its parent is folded so what this node is constructed from).

member.name: P:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode.IsRecursionIncomplete
member.summary: In the case if mixed recursion tree during the analysis whether the node is REALLY recursive we might come into decision that some nodes are achievable from the given one when being folded, while some other are not. This attribute indicates that folding has to be done with some filtering depending on the current folding.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IGainChangeableNode
member.summary: Interface is a hack for updating nodes from an inproper place.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ISNodesCollection
member.summary: This interface defines the MOST generic properties of the collection of snapshot nodes. The objective is to abstract as much as possible from the structure of the snapshot node and to be able to operate with the set of them on more generic level. NB: currently the only well-defined property is the computation of hash function.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.AllFunctionCallsUnderRootConstructor.AssertFidsEqual(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode})
member.summary: Ensure that all storage nodes which consistute the given ICallTreeNode[IMeasureNode] have the same id. NB: A little bit strange iteration method is implemented to accomodate the case when a node has no storage nodes at all (e.g. root or other artificial nodes).

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.TopNodesIterations.ForEachTopNodeReversed(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode},System.Action{JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode})
member.summary: Iterate over the set of top nodes in its REVERSED direction, that is from the biggest offset to the lowest For Header nodes use knowledge about its internal structure to minimize memory allocations and extra sorts

Iterate over the set of top nodes in its STRAIGHT direction, that is from the lowest offset to the biggest. For Header nodes use knowledge about its internal structure to minimize memory allocations and extra sorts

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.NodeLogic
member.summary: NodeLogic contains extension methods for unification of different operations over the miscellaneous classes within the ICallTreeNode(IMeasureNode) hierarchy. It seems however that these methods more indicate that we have a design flow and all this fluff should be refactored.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.NodeLogic.ForStorageNodesDo(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode},System.Action{JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode})
member.summary:
Method performs a single action for all storage nodes of the nodes without constructing a (potentially) huge array of CallTreeSectionNode instances, thus avoiding OutOfMemory exception.
NB: order of action application is indeterminate in general case.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.NodeLogic.HasTopNodesImplicitely(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode})
member.summary: Determine whether there exist an implicit (even partial) hierarchy within a list of snapshot nodes.
Fast version which does not compute top-nodes set inside the PerformanceSnapshot.IsContainedUnderRoot. Instead it passes this set as-is.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.NodeLogic.Contains(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode},JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode)
member.summary: If the is an ordinary node, then operation is just a simple seek over the storage nodes it contains. Otherwise, if the node is a root node (which has no defined storage nodes) we need to seek any of its thread ones.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.NodeLogic.ForAllChildFids(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode},System.Predicate{JetBrains.Common.Util.Metadata.FunctionId})
member.summary: Iterate over all ChildRef structures of all storage nodes contained in the given ICallTreeNode, and check that all ChildRef.ChilMethodId's conform to a given predicate. This is a workaround of a standard method in which we usually load CallTreeSectionNode by a child offset and then checked the same predicate over the result structure, that is it's much faster than: node.GetChildren().All( child => func( child.FId() ))) )

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.LockWithMe(JetBrains.Util.FileSystemPath)
member.summary: Small hack for our "saving" snapshot system. In fact we don't save currently opened snapshot but exporting the data and continue to work with the temporary one. It leads that it's possible to delete saved snapshot file. This method allow to lock such file till the current temporary snapshot is opened.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.HeaderEnumerator
member.summary: First we emit those header sets which correspond to precomputed indices inside the groups array. Second, iterate over all groups and collect orthogonal arrays (per function) and emit them afterwards.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.IsFidIncluded(JetBrains.Common.Util.Metadata.FunctionId,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.Int32})
member.summary: Analyze an intersection of the given set of section indices (e.g. from the root node when producing a slice) with the section indices for the given IFId. Using strict matching mechanism for the functions which have short Profile (less than 5 entries in the indices) and heuristic matching for those which have larger profiles - if sets are POTENTIALLY intersec we return YES. NB: Output parameter "passedSectionIndices" is dummy currently.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.IsNodeUnderOtherNodeFast(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode},JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode})
member.summary: Check whether a "node" is under the "parent". Using fast technique which checks only the first storageNode of the given node - if it's under any of the parent storageNodes, return TRUE.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.LoadFunctionNode(JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionOffset)
member.summary: Load the FunctionNode section from the current offset in the files.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.LoadFunctionNodeUncached(JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionOffset)
member.summary: Load the FunctionNode section from the current offset in the files.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.LoadNodesUnderRoot(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.ICallTreeNode{JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Nodes.IMeasureNode},JetBrains.Common.Util.Metadata.FunctionId,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Find all nodes with id= under the root node(s) stored in the .

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.LoadNodesUnderRoots(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode},JetBrains.Common.Util.Metadata.FunctionId,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Find all nodes with id= under the root node(s) stored in the .

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.ForbidCache(JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionOffset)
member.summary: Forbid caching the requested results in a cache, specific to a particular CallTree section.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.RestoreCache(JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionOffset,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enable caching (back) of the requested results in a cache, specific to a particular CallTree section.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Performance.PerformanceSnapshot.EnumerateAllFunctions(JetBrains.Application.Progress.IProgressIndicator)
member.summary: Debugging-oriented function

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Persistence.IRestorativeState`1
member.summary: Can restore the target object

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Persistence.IRestorativeState`2
member.summary: Can restore target object using some context of type P

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Persistence.IState
member.summary: Represents a state of some

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Persistence.IStateAppliable`1
member.summary: Can collect and apply state of type T

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Persistence.IStateful`1
member.summary: Represents an object that can gather its state

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Providers.ISnapshotProcessor
member.summary: A ISnapshotProcessor-derived class is a piece of code which is called automatically when all components of the snapshot are injected and configured properly after Snapshot.ComponentContainer.Compose is called. Each postprocessor component has an access to its own progress indicator to visualize its progress. Post processing classes are collected in TODO: add priority if necessary.

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Signatures.FunctionSignature.Options.QualifiedFunction
member.summary: Contains namespace and class name in the description

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Signatures.FunctionSignature.Options.LongPresentable
member.summary: Contains namespace, class name, list of parameters and interface implementation

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Signatures.FunctionSignature.Options.Presentable
member.summary: Contains namespace, class name, list of parameters

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Signatures.FunctionSignature.Options.NormalizedPresentable
member.summary: Contains namespace, class name, list of parameters

member.name: F:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Signatures.FunctionSignature.Options.ShortPresentable
member.summary: Contains only class name and list of parameters

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Signatures.FunctionSignature.#ctor(System.String,JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.ThreadFlags)
member.summary: For "ThreadStart" nodes and "ALL THREADS" node

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Signatures.FunctionSignature.#ctor(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.Signatures.ClassSignature,System.String)
member.summary: For synthetic FUIDs like "[Failed to extract metadata...]", and groupping nodes in PlainView and UtrView

For KnownFUId names (like KnownFunctionId.AppDomainShutdownCallId=="[Shutdown of application domain]") or special signature identifying a failure during the metadata extraction (ClassSignature.Unknown=="[Failed to extract metadata]")
For general construction of Signatures -> interactively extracted signature for a call tree, where all fields are extracted at once.

member.name: T:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.SnapshotToolWindowContent`1
member.summary: Can be used for tool windows whose content object (for first instance or empty content) needs snapshot components for their factoring. Wrap with this type so that your factory would only be called when snapshot components are available, and in context of the snapshot container.

Can be used for tool windows whose content object (for first instance or empty content) needs snapshot components for their factoring. Wrap with this type so that your factory would only be called when snapshot components are available, and in context of the snapshot container.
